AsyncSearch.name: Index name, exact match only (no wildcards)
AsyncSearch.query: Same syntax as standard query DSL, see [official docs](https://www.elastic.co/docs/reference/query-languages/querydsl)
AsyncSearch.aggs: Same syntax as standard Aggregations, see [official docs](https://www.elastic.co/docs/reference/aggregations/)
AsyncSearch.fields: List of fields to return; defaults to all fields
AsyncSearch.sort: Sort order; currently only supports sorting by @timestamp, defaults to descending
AsyncSearch.searchAfter: Pagination cursor for next page; only the first array element is supported; defaults to the first entry from the specified time
AsyncSearch.size: Number of matching log entries to return; default 1000
